justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for "next Wednesday" and "Thursday morning, June 4th" and accurately searched for availability.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots on Wednesday when the initial 9 AM request was unavailable, and then offered a suitable slot on Thursday when the user expressed a preference for earlier times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and booked the appointment in three turns, without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear options and successfully booking the appointment without any friction.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context when the first slot proposal was rejected, intelligently expanded the search to include Thursday morning, and successfully found a suitable alternative.
